title: How public libraries are turning into climate shelters
summary: Public libraries in several cities are being redesigned as heat-safe community shelters during longer and more frequent summer heat waves.
whyWorthReading: 它把一个你平时未必会主动进入的话题，变成了一个低门槛的探索入口。

title: Why small museums are publishing open conservation logs
summary: Smaller museums are posting restoration notes in public, giving visitors a closer look at how fragile collections are preserved over time.
whyWorthReading: 它把一个你平时未必会主动进入的话题，变成了一个低门槛的探索入口。
